sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77011" key="pallaki=nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παλλᾰκ-ῖνος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n77011.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">son by a concubine</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:124" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">124</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
